cli.error_path: Error: Please specify a file or directory path.
cli.violations_found: 🚨 Rule violations detected. Add -f flag for details.
cli.scan_complete: 🚨 Scan complete. Please fix the violations above.

rules.no_table: ARCHITECTURE: <table> usage is forbidden. Please use CSS Grid or Flexbox.
rules.no_i18n_fallback: I18N: Fallback (??) used. Translations must strictly come from i18n files!
rules.no_hardcoded_colors: THEME: Hardcoded Tailwind color found! Please use semantic variables.
rules.no_click_on_non_interactive: A11Y: on:click cannot be applied to div or span! Use <button type="button">.
rules.no_svelte_ignore: SECURITY: 'svelte-ignore' escape detected! Write compliant code.
rules.no_console_log: CLEANLINESS: console.log left behind! Cannot log to production.
rules.no_static_inline_style: ARCHITECTURE: Static Inline style usage is forbidden! Move to Tailwind classes.
rules.no_magic_numbers: THEME: Magic Number found. Use standard Tailwind spacing/sizing.
rules.no_v3_tailwind_vars: THEME: Old Tailwind v3 syntax used. Please use v4 syntax.
rules.missing_skeleton: MISSING COMPONENT: Loading state exists but Skeleton is NOT USED!
rules.missing_i18n_import: MISSING IMPORT: i18n 't' function is not imported!
